methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Drones & Autonomous (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 5 same-sector peers exist in Drones & Autonomous, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
Terra Drone, a publicly listed Japanese firm in the Drones & Autonomous sector founded by Toru Tokushige, presents a valuation challenge due to limited comparable data. The broader sector contains five same-stage peers, but none satisfy the filtering criteria for meaningful peer-median analysis—requiring a minimum of three comparables at the same stage, adjacent stage, or similar valuation tier. The identifiable private peer set includes Joby Aviation, Zipline, Nuro, Archer Aviation, and Elroy Air; however, no public comparables in this exact subsector exist, eliminating traditional public-market benchmarking.

Given the absence of applicable triangulation methods, a conventional peer-median valuation cannot be supported. The fundamental constraint is the scarcity of sufficiently comparable public or private entities at Terra Drone's development and commercial stage. Any reliance on all-sector median multiples would introduce material distortion, as the broader Drones & Autonomous universe likely spans heterogeneous business models, geographies, and monetization pathways that may not reflect Terra Drone's specific risk profile.

This analysis highlights a critical limitation: Terra Drone's valuation requires either direct transaction benchmarks, discounted cash flow modeling with explicit assumptions, or precedent transaction analysis rather than peer multiples. Without quantitative support from comparables, determining an appropriate valuation range is not feasible from the available data. Further diligence should focus on identifying transaction-level precedents or developing company-specific fundamental models.
